# Auth token refresh

## Intent

Refresh the auth token before it expires.

## Non-goals

- Not session storage.

## Requirements

### AC-001 — refreshes before expiry

When the token is within the refresh window, the client must request a new token.

Verify with: `npm test -- auth`

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/auth/token.ts`
